con:config.con:query: select * from retail.terminal where terminal_code='${terminal_code#Result}' and tenant_id='${tenantid}' --and DATE_TIME_CREATED_UTC >'2022-10-01 15:00:44.18352'

con:config.script: def token = context.expand('${Login#Response#$.token}') testRunner.testCase.testSteps['Properties'].setPropertyValue("TerminalToken",'Bearer '+token)
def franchiseName = testRunner.testCase.testSuite.project.testSuites['GSBet _settlement'].testCases['Create_Franchise'].testSteps['properties'].getPropertyValue("franchiseName") return franchiseName
def franchiseId = testRunner.testCase.testSuite.project.testSuites['GSBet _settlement'].testCases['Create_Franchise'].testSteps['properties'].getPropertyValue("franchiseId") return franchiseId

con:config.con:query: select * from virtualbingo.round where offer_group_id = '${OfferGroupId#Result}' and result_processed_datetime is null order by start_datetime asc limit 5

con:config.script: return UUID.randomUUID().toString()
